stop_reason.description: The reason that this run was stopped

failure_category.description: The category of failure that caused this run to stop

last_successful_lifecycle_state.description: The last successful lifecycle state that this run was in before it failed

failure_detail_reference.description: The artifact reference that contains details about the failure that caused this run to stop

partial_result_references.description: The artifact references that contain partial results produced by this run before it failed

cleanup_completed.description: Whether or not the cleanup phase of this run has completed
